description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that runs docker info and logs into the registry. Define stages build, test, and release and set global variables CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the build stage add build_fedora27 and build_fedora28 jobs (except master) that set DISTRO and TAG variables and execute "docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG -f Dockerfile.$DISTRO ." then "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG". In the test stage add test_fedora27 and test_fedora28 jobs (except master) that set DISTRO, INIT, and TAG variables and run "docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker run --name $CONTAINER_ID -d --privileged -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:ro $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG $INIT", and "docker exec --tty $CONTAINER_ID env TERM=xterm ansible --version". In the release stage add release-image_fedora27, release-image_fedora28, and release-image_latest jobs (only master) that set RELEASE_TAG and TAG variables and run "docker pull $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker tag $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG", and "docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG".
